verses.latin_vulgate: Petite a Domino pluviam in tempore serotino,  et Dominus faciet nives :  et pluviam imbris dabit eis,  singulis herbam in agro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁאֲל֨וּ מֵיְהֹוָ֤ה מָטָר֙ בְּעֵ֣ת מַלְק֔וֹשׁ יְהֹוָ֖ה עֹשֶׂ֣ה חֲזִיזִ֑ים וּמְטַר־גֶּ֙שֶׁם֙ יִתֵּ֣ן לָהֶ֔ם לְאִ֖ישׁ עֵ֥שֶׂב בַּשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ask ye of the Lord rain in the latter season, and the Lord will make snows, and will give them showers of rain, to every one grass in the field.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anokaat Herralta ehtoo sadetta, niin Herra tekee pilven, ja antaa teille kyllä sataa, kaikelle kedon kasvulle.
verses.king_james: Ask ye of the Lord rain in the time of the latter rain; so the Lord shall make bright clouds, and give them showers of rain, to every one grass in the field.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia simulacra locuta sunt inutile,  et divini viderunt mendacium :  et somniatores locuti sunt frustra,  vane consolabantur :  idcirco abducti sunt quasi grex :  affligentur, quia non est eis pastor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֧י הַתְּרָפִ֣ים דִּבְּרוּ־אָ֗וֶן וְהַקּֽוֹסְמִים֙ חָ֣זוּ שֶׁ֔קֶר וַֽחֲלֹמוֹת֙ הַשָּׁ֣וְא יְדַבֵּ֔רוּ הֶ֖בֶל יְנַחֵמ֑וּן עַל־כֵּן֙ נָסְע֣וּ כְמוֹ־צֹ֔אן יַעֲנ֖וּ כִּי־אֵ֥ין רֹעֶֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For the idols have spoken what was unprofitable, and the diviners have seen a lie, and the dreamers have spoken vanity: they comforted in vain: therefore they were led away as a flock: they shall be afflicted, because they have no shepherd.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä epäjumalat puhuvat turhuutta, ja aavistajat näkevät valheen; ja puhuvat turhia unia, ja heidän lohdutuksensa ei ole mitään: sentähden he käyvät eksyksissä niinkuin lampaat, ja nääntyvät, ettei heillä ole yhtään paimenta.
verses.king_james: For the idols have spoken vanity, and the diviners have seen a lie, and have told false dreams; they comfort in vain: therefore they went their way as a flock, they were troubled, because there was no shepherd.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super pastores iratus est furor meus,  et super hircos visitabo :  quia visitavit Dominus exercituum gregem suum, domum Juda,  et posuit eos quasi equum gloriæ suæ in bello.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־הָֽרֹעִים֙ חָרָ֣ה אַפִּ֔י וְעַל־הָעַתּוּדִ֖ים אֶפְק֑וֹד כִּֽי־פָקַד֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה צְבָא֤וֹת אֶת־עֶדְרוֹ֙ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יְהוּדָ֔ה וְשָׂ֣ם אוֹתָ֔ם כְּס֥וּס הוֹד֖וֹ בַּמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: My wrath is kindled against the shepherds, and I will visit upon the buck goats: for the Lord of hosts hath visited his flock, the house of Juda, and hath made them as the horse of his glory in the battle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun vihani on julmistunut paimenten päälle, ja minä tahdon kauriit etsiä; sillä Herran Zebaot on etsivä laumansa, Juudan huoneen, ja valmistaa heitä niinkuin hankituita sotahevosia.
verses.king_james: Mine anger was kindled against the shepherds, and I punished the goats: for the Lord of hosts hath visited his flock the house of Judah, and hath made them as his goodly horse in the battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex ipso angulus, ex ipso paxillus,  ex ipso arcus prælii,  ex ipso egredietur omnis exactor simul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִמֶּ֤נּוּ פִנָּה֙ מִמֶּ֣נּוּ יָתֵ֔ד מִמֶּ֖נּוּ קֶ֣שֶׁת מִלְחָמָ֑ה מִמֶּ֛נּוּ יֵצֵ֥א כׇל־נוֹגֵ֖שׂ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Out of him shall come forth the corner, out of him the pin, out of him the bow of battle, out of him every exacter together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Häneltä ovat nurkat, häneltä naulat, häneltä sotajoutsi, häneltä myös ynnä kaikki vaatiat tulleet.
verses.king_james: Out of him came forth the corner, out of him the nail, out of him the battle bow, out of him every oppressor together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt quasi fortes conculcantes lutum viarum in prælio,  et bellabunt, quia Dominus cum eis :  et confundentur ascensores equorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָי֨וּ כְגִבֹּרִ֜ים בּוֹסִ֨ים בְּטִ֤יט חוּצוֹת֙ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וְנִ֨לְחֲמ֔וּ כִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה עִמָּ֑ם וְהֹבִ֖ישׁוּ רֹכְבֵ֥י סוּסִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall be as mighty men, treading under foot the mire of the ways in battle: and they shall fight, because the Lord is with them, and the riders of horses shall be confounded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän pitää kuitenkin oleman niinkuin sankarit, jotka loan tallaavat kaduilla sodassa, ja pitää sotiman, sillä Herra on heidän kanssansa, että ratsasmiehet häpiään tulevat.
verses.king_james: And they shall be as mighty men, which tread down their enemies in the mire of the streets in the battle: and they shall fight, because the Lord is with them, and the riders on horses shall be confounded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et confortabo domum Juda,  et domum Joseph salvabo :  et convertam eos, quia miserebor eorum :  et erunt sicut fuerunt quando non projeceram eos :  ego enim Dominus Deus eorum, et exaudiam eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגִבַּרְתִּ֣י ׀ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יְהוּדָ֗ה וְאֶת־בֵּ֤ית יוֹסֵף֙ אוֹשִׁ֔יעַ וְהֽוֹשְׁבוֹתִים֙ כִּ֣י רִֽחַמְתִּ֔ים וְהָי֖וּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־זְנַחְתִּ֑ים כִּ֗י אֲנִ֛י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֖ם וְאֶעֱנֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will strengthen the house of Juda, and save the house of Joseph: and I will bring them back again, because I will have mercy on them: and they shall be as they were when I had not cast them off, for I am the Lord their God, and will hear them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon vahvistaa Juudan huoneen, ja varjella Josephin huonetta, ja tahdon heitä asettaa jälleen sijoillensa; sillä minä armahdan heitä; ja he ovat niinkuin he ennenkin olivat, kuin minä heidät sysäsin pois; sillä minä Herra heidän Jumalansa tahdon heitä kuulla.
verses.king_james: And I will strengthen the house of Judah, and I will save the house of Joseph, and I will bring them again to place them; for I have mercy upon them: and they shall be as though I had not cast them off: for I am the Lord their God, and will hear them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt quasi fortes Ephraim,  et lætabitur cor eorum quasi a vino :  et filii eorum videbunt, et lætabuntur,  et exsultabit cor eorum in Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָי֤וּ כְגִבּוֹר֙ אֶפְרַ֔יִם וְשָׂמַ֥ח לִבָּ֖ם כְּמוֹ־יָ֑יִן וּבְנֵיהֶם֙ יִרְא֣וּ וְשָׂמֵ֔חוּ יָגֵ֥ל לִבָּ֖ם בַּיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall be as the valiant men of Ephraim, and their heart shall rejoice as through wine: and their children shall see, and shall rejoice, and their heart shall be joyful in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ephraim on oleva niinkuin sankari, ja heidän sydämensä on iloitseva niinkuin viinasta; ja heidän lapsensa saavat myös sen nähdä, ja riemuitsevat, että heidän sydämensä on iloinen Herrassa.
verses.king_james: And they of Ephraim shall be like a mighty man, and their heart shall rejoice as through wine: yea, their children shall see it, and be glad; their heart shall rejoice in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sibilabo eis, et congregabo illos,  quia redemi eos :  et multiplicabo eos sicut ante fuerant multiplicati.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׁרְקָ֥ה לָהֶ֛ם וַאֲקַבְּצֵ֖ם כִּ֣י פְדִיתִ֑ים וְרָב֖וּ כְּמ֥וֹ רָבֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will whistle for them, and I will gather them together, because I have redeemed them: and I will multiply them as they were multiplied before.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon heille viheltää, ja koota heitä, sillä minä tahdon heitä lunastaa; ja he lisääntyvät niinkuin he ennenkin olleet olivat.
verses.king_james: I will hiss for them, and gather them; for I have redeemed them: and they shall increase as they have increased.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et seminabo eos in populis,  et de longe recordabuntur mei :  et vivent cum filiis suis, et revertentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶזְרָעֵם֙ בָּעַמִּ֔ים וּבַמֶּרְחַקִּ֖ים יִזְכְּר֑וּנִי וְחָי֥וּ אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶ֖ם וָשָֽׁבוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will sow them among peoples: and from afar they shall remember me: and they shall live with their children, and shall return.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tahdon kylvää heitä kansain sekaan, että he muistaisivat minua kaukaisissa maakunnissa, ja eläisivät lastensa kanssa ja palajaisivat.
verses.king_james: And I will sow them among the people: and they shall remember me in far countries; and they shall live with their children, and turn again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et reducam eos de terra Ægypti,  et de Assyriis congregabo eos,  et ad terram Galaad et Libani adducam eos,  et non invenietur eis locus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲשִֽׁבוֹתִים֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם וּמֵאַשּׁ֖וּר אֲקַבְּצֵ֑ם וְאֶל־אֶ֨רֶץ גִּלְעָ֤ד וּלְבָנוֹן֙ אֲבִיאֵ֔ם וְלֹ֥א יִמָּצֵ֖א לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will bring them back out of the land of Egypt, and I will gather them from among the Assyrians: and will bring them to the land of Galaad, and Libanus, and place shall not be found for them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä tahdon heitä tuoda jälleen Egyptin maalta, ja koota heitä Assyriasta, ja saattaa heitä Gileadin maahan ja Libanoniin, ja ei siinäkään pidä heillä kyllä oleman.
verses.king_james: I will bring them again also out of the land of Egypt, and gather them out of Assyria; and I will bring them into the land of Gilead and Lebanon; and place shall not be found for them.

verses.latin_vulgate: et transibit in maris freto,  et percutiet in mari fluctus,  et confundentur omnia profunda fluminis :  et humiliabitur superbia Assur,  et sceptrum Ægypti recedet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָבַ֨ר בַּיָּ֜ם צָרָ֗ה וְהִכָּ֤ה בַיָּם֙ גַּלִּ֔ים וְהֹבִ֕ישׁוּ כֹּ֖ל מְצוּל֣וֹת יְאֹ֑ר וְהוּרַד֙ גְּא֣וֹן אַשּׁ֔וּר וְשֵׁ֥בֶט מִצְרַ֖יִם יָסֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall pass over the strait of the sea, and shall strike the waves in the sea, and all the depths of the river shall be confounded, and the pride of Assyria shall be humbled, and the sceptre of Egypt shall depart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen pitää käymän sen ahtaan meren lävitse, ja meren aaltoja lyömän, että kaikki ojain syvyydet kuivuisivat; silloin Assyrian ylpeys alennetaan, ja Egyptin valtikka lakkaa.
verses.king_james: And he shall pass through the sea with affliction, and shall smite the waves in the sea, and all the deeps of the river shall dry up: and the pride of Assyria shall be brought down, and the sceptre of Egypt shall depart away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confortabo eos in Domino,  et in nomine ejus ambulabunt, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגִבַּרְתִּים֙ בַּיהֹוָ֔ה וּבִשְׁמ֖וֹ יִתְהַלָּ֑כוּ נְאֻ֖ם יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: I will strengthen them in the Lord, and they shall walk in his name, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon heitä vahvistaa Herrassa, ja heidän pitää vaeltaman hänen nimeensä, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: And I will strengthen them in the Lord; and they shall walk up and down in his name, saith the Lord.
